'''Daniel Wallace''' has written many ''[[Star Wars]]'' books, including several in the [[Star Wars: Essential Guides|Essential Guide]] series and several sourcebooks for the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]].

In the mid-1990s, Daniel was a participant in the [[FidoNet Star Wars Echo]].
